dropped_summary: All frames show the lecturer speaking with a whiteboard in the background, but the whiteboard content is either blurred, partially obscured, or not clearly legible. The frames do not capture distinct, clear teaching artifacts like formulas, diagrams, or UIs. They are also not unique enough to serve as source-backed evidence, so they are all dropped.
